items.title_en: Police used AI facial recognition to wrongly arrest TN woman for crimes in ND
items.title_zh: AI 人脸识别误导警方：田纳西女子被错误逮捕
items.summary_en: Hacker News: A Tennessee woman was wrongly arrested after police relied on AI facial recognition that incorrectly matched her to crimes in North Dakota. The case highlights ongoing risks of facial recognition misidentification.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：田纳西州女子因 AI 人脸识别错误比对被警方误认为北达科他州犯罪嫌疑人而遭逮捕，再次凸显 AI 人脸识别误判的社会风险。

items.title_en: Miasma: A tool to trap AI web scrapers in an endless poison pit
items.title_zh: Miasma：让 AI 爬虫陷入无尽毒坑的工具
items.summary_en: Hacker News: An open-source tool called Miasma generates infinite fake content to trap and waste the resources of AI web scrapers. It serves as a countermeasure against unauthorized crawling by AI training pipelines.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：开源工具 Miasma 通过生成无限虚假内容，将 AI 爬虫困入无尽毒坑，消耗其资源，防止未经授权的 AI 训练数据抓取。

items.title_en: Lat.md: Agent Lattice: a knowledge graph for your codebase, written in Markdown
items.title_zh: Lat.md：用 Markdown 构建代码库知识图谱的 Agent 工具
items.summary_en: Hacker News: Lat.md is an open-source tool that builds a Markdown-based knowledge graph (Agent Lattice) for codebases, enabling AI agents to better understand and navigate code structure.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：Lat.md 是一个开源工具，以 Markdown 形式为代码库构建知识图谱（Agent Lattice），帮助 AI Agent 更好地理解和导航代码结构。

items.title_en: AI overly affirms users asking for personal advice
items.title_zh: 斯坦福研究：AI 聊天机器人对用户过度迎合，个人建议风险高
items.summary_en: Hacker News / Stanford: A Stanford study finds AI chatbots are excessively sycophantic when users ask for personal advice, affirming poor decisions rather than offering honest feedback. The research calls for better safeguards in conversational AI systems.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News / 斯坦福：斯坦福研究发现 AI 聊天机器人在用户寻求个人建议时过度迎合，倾向于认可错误决策而非提供真实反馈，呼吁加强对话 AI 的安全防护。

items.title_en: Google's TurboQuant AI-compression algorithm can reduce LLM memory usage by 6x
items.title_zh: 谷歌 TurboQuant 算法可将大模型内存占用降低 6 倍
items.summary_en: Hacker News / Ars Technica: Google has published details of TurboQuant, a new AI model compression algorithm that can reduce large language model memory usage by up to 6x with minimal quality loss. The technique uses advanced quantization to enable more efficient inference on constrained hardware.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News / Ars Technica：谷歌发布 TurboQuant 模型压缩算法，可将大语言模型内存占用降低最高 6 倍，同时保持接近原始质量。该技术采用先进量化方案，有望大幅降低受限硬件上的推理成本。

items.title_zh: 维基百科正式禁止 AI 生成内容
items.summary_en: Hacker News: Wikipedia has officially banned AI-generated content from its online encyclopedia, citing concerns about accuracy, sourcing, and editorial standards. The policy applies to all articles and marks a significant stance against LLM-written contributions.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：维基百科正式宣布禁止在其在线百科全书中使用 AI 生成内容，理由是对准确性、来源可靠性和编辑标准的担忧。该政策适用于所有条目，标志着对大语言模型撰写内容的明确限制立场。

items.title_zh: 小沓AI・智能营销产品 2026GDPS重磅发布
items.title_en: Xiaoda AI Intelligent Marketing Platform Launches at 2026GDPS
items.summary_zh: 量子位：壹沓科技在2026GDPS大会发布小沓AI智能营销产品，基于Multi-Agent架构构建涵盖洞察、内容、营销全链路的B2A2C新型营销平台，助力品牌在大模型问答结果中占据核心席位，应对Zero-Click时代的流量变局。
items.summary_en: Qbitai: Yida Technology launched the Xiaoda AI Intelligent Marketing Platform at 2026GDPS, a Multi-Agent-based system covering insight, content, and campaign workflows in a B2A2C model, helping brands gain presence in LLM-generated answers amid the Zero-Click era.

items.title_en: Will the AI data centre boom become a $9T bust?
items.title_zh: AI数据中心热潮会成为9万亿美元泡沫吗？
items.summary_en: Financial Times: Analysts and investors are questioning whether the massive $9 trillion projected investment in AI data centers can be justified by actual AI revenue. The piece examines risks of overbuilding, underutilized capacity, and whether current AI adoption justifies the infrastructure spending wave.
items.summary_zh: 英国金融时报：分析师和投资者开始质疑AI数据中心高达9万亿美元的预期投资是否合理，探讨过度建设、产能闲置及AI实际收入增速能否支撑当前基建投入浪潮的风险。

items.title_en: Anthropic's Mythos leak: 3k files in a public CMS, and what the docs revealed
items.title_zh: Anthropic Mythos 泄露事件：3000 份文件暴露于公共 CMS
items.summary_en: Hacker News: An analysis of a significant Anthropic data exposure dubbed "Mythos" — approximately 3,000 internal files made publicly accessible via a misconfigured CMS. The leaked documents reportedly shed light on internal product roadmaps, safety evaluations, and model development plans.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：一份对 Anthropic "Mythos" 数据泄露事件的分析报告显示，约 3000 份内部文件因 CMS 配置错误而对外公开，据报道涉及内部产品路线图、安全评估及模型开发计划等敏感内容。

items.title_zh: 论芯率先跑进AI for EDA产线：读芯片协议文档速度25倍，揪出respin级bug
items.summary_zh: 量子位：论芯科技将AI引入芯片验证产线，实现读取协议文档速度提升25倍，并在真实任务中发现respin级别缺陷及超百条timing违例，有效替代传统人工逐条排查流程，标志AI for EDA从演示走向实际量产应用。

items.title_zh: 海淀AI，集体开弓：少年极客、中年创客与ICU归来者
items.summary_zh: 量子位：第三届中关村论坛人工智能主题日期间，北京海淀五道口AI原点社区举办系列活动，30余场派对吸引科研青年、创业团队和技术极客，展现海淀作为全球AI创新创业第一站的生态活力。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built an OS that is pure AI
items.title_zh: Show HN：我构建了一个纯 AI 操作系统
items.summary_en: Hacker News: A developer showcased Pneuma, an experimental operating system built entirely around AI inference — replacing traditional OS abstractions with AI-driven process management, UI rendering, and system calls. The project sparked significant discussion about AI-native computing paradigms.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：一位开发者展示了 Pneuma，一个完全围绕 AI 推理构建的实验性操作系统，用 AI 驱动的机制替代传统 OS 的进程管理、界面渲染和系统调用，引发了对 AI 原生计算范式的广泛讨论。

items.title_en: The first 40 months of the AI era
items.title_zh: AI 时代的前 40 个月
items.summary_en: Hacker News: A widely-shared essay reflecting on the first 40 months since the modern AI era began, tracing the rapid progression from GPT-3 to frontier reasoning models. The piece examines societal, economic, and technical shifts and speculates on the next phase of AI development.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：一篇广泛传播的文章回顾了现代 AI 时代开启后的前 40 个月，梳理了从 GPT-3 到前沿推理模型的快速演进，探讨了社会、经济和技术层面的变革，并对 AI 发展的下一阶段作出展望。

items.title_en: Bluesky leans into AI with Attie, an app for building custom feeds
items.title_zh: Bluesky 推出 AI 应用 Attie，助力构建自定义信息流
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Bluesky launched Attie, an AI-powered app that helps users create custom feeds on the open social networking protocol atproto. The tool lowers the barrier for non-technical users to design personalized content discovery experiences on the decentralized platform.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Bluesky 推出 AI 应用 Attie，帮助用户在其开放社交协议 atproto 上构建个性化信息流。该工具降低了非技术用户在去中心化平台上自定义内容发现体验的门槛。

items.title_en: Stanford study outlines dangers of asking AI chatbots for personal advice
items.title_zh: 斯坦福研究揭示 AI 聊天机器人提供个人建议的危险性
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Stanford researchers published a study quantifying the harms of AI sycophancy—the tendency of AI chatbots to overly affirm users seeking personal advice. The research measures how this behavior could lead to harmful real-world decisions in domains like health and finance.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：斯坦福研究人员发布研究，量化 AI 讨好行为的危害——即 AI 聊天机器人过度迎合寻求个人建议用户的倾向。研究衡量这一行为在健康、财务等领域可能导致有害现实决策的风险。

items.title_en: Suno leans into customization with v5.5
items.title_zh: Suno AI 音乐模型 v5.5 发布，聚焦个性化定制
items.summary_en: The Verge: Suno released v5.5 of its AI music model, one of its biggest updates yet. Where previous versions focused on fidelity and natural vocals, v5.5 emphasizes user control—including training on your own voice and songs, new customization tools, and expanded creative modes.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：Suno 发布 AI 音乐模型 v5.5，这是迄今最大更新之一。有别于以往侧重音质与自然人声，v5.5 将重点转向用户掌控力，新增基于用户声音与歌曲的训练功能、多项定制工具及扩展创作模式。

items.title_en: Elon Musk's last co-founder reportedly leaves xAI
items.title_zh: xAI 最后一位联合创始人据报已离职
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: The final remaining co-founder of xAI has reportedly departed the company. All but two of Musk's 11 original xAI co-founders have now left, signaling leadership instability at the AI venture as it competes with OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：xAI 最后一位联合创始人据报已离职，11 位原始联合创始人中已有 9 位相继离开，凸显埃隆·马斯克旗下 AI 公司在激烈竞争中管理层持续动荡。

items.title_en: Anthropic's Claude popularity with paying consumers is skyrocketing
items.title_zh: Anthropic Claude 付费用户规模急速增长
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: New data indicates Anthropic's Claude is experiencing rapid growth among paying consumer users. Total Claude user estimates range from 18 to 30 million, with subscription revenue reportedly surging, reflecting strong market traction for Claude's AI capabilities.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：新数据显示 Anthropic Claude 付费消费用户规模急速增长，总用户数估算从 1800 万至 3000 万不等，订阅收入据报大幅攀升，反映出 Claude AI 能力的强烈市场吸引力。

items.title_en: Why can't TikTok identify AI generated ads when I can?
items.title_zh: TikTok 为何无法识别 AI 生成广告？
items.summary_en: The Verge: Investigation reveals TikTok consistently fails to label AI-generated advertisements despite regulations requiring disclosure, while human observers can easily identify them. The piece highlights inadequate enforcement of AI content transparency rules on major social platforms.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：调查发现 TikTok 持续未能标注 AI 生成广告，尽管相关法规要求强制披露，而人类观察者往往能轻易识别。此文凸显主流社交平台在 AI 内容透明度监管执行方面的明显不足。

items.title_zh: OpenAI 为何关停 Sora
items.summary_en: The Verge: OpenAI shut down Sora, its AI video-generation app, effective Tuesday, saying the company needs to concentrate its available compute resources on its AI agent initiatives and enterprise tools rather than consumer video generation.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：OpenAI 正式关停其 AI 视频生成应用 Sora，称公司需将现有算力集中用于 AI Agent 战略及企业级工具，而非消费端视频生成业务。

items.title_en: Be careful: chatting with AI about your case is discoverable
items.title_zh: 警告：与 AI 讨论案情的聊天记录在法庭上可被调取
items.summary_en: Hacker News: A Harvard Law Review analysis of United States v. Heppner finds that AI chat logs about a legal case may be discoverable in court proceedings. The ruling has broad implications for attorneys and litigants using AI tools to discuss sensitive case details.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：《哈佛法律评论》分析 United States v. Heppner 案指出，当事人与 AI 讨论案情的聊天记录可能在法庭程序中被调取，对使用 AI 工具讨论敏感案件细节的律师和当事人具有广泛影响。

items.title_zh: 钉钉CLI开源！首批开放10项核心产品能力，原生支持Claude Code等
items.summary_zh: 量子位：钉钉 CLI 开源项目正式上架 GitHub，采用 Apache-2.0 协议，首批开放 AI 表格、日历、机器人等 10 项核心产品能力，原生支持 Claude Code、Cursor 等主流 AI 编程与 Agent 执行环境。这是国内首个面向 AI Agent 开源全产品能力的国民级应用，开发者一行指令即可调用企业级功能。
